violations.text: Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The three bay sink located in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Establishment must replace three bay sink. Establishment is to send proof of repair to RIDOH Office of Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the three bay have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
